title: Medical Radiology and Imaging Profesinals (Fees, Chrges and Forms) Regulations, 2010
title_en: Medical Radiology and Imaging Profesinals (Fees, Chrges and Forms) Regulations, 2010

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Medical Radiology and Imaging Professionals (Fees, Charges and Forms) Regulations, 2010 and shall come into operation on the publication date.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless context requires otherwise”: “ Act ” means the Medical Radiology and Imaging Professionals Act; Part II – Fees and charges

provisions.title: Payment of fees
provisions.content: (1) Every person who has been provisionally, temporarily or fully registered, enrolled, enlisted or licensed under Part III of the Act shall be required to pay a prescribed fee. (2) Subject to sub regulation (1) the fees set out in the First Schedule to these Regulations shall be payable in respect of the matter set out thereof. (3) All supervisors shall be responsible for records of payment of fees made under this Part. (4) For purpose the sub-regulations (1) , the person under regulation 3 shall pay such fee in a Bank Account chosen by the Council and submit the receipt thereof to the supervisor. (5) Any prescribed fee under these Regulations shall be paid on the due date.

provisions.title: Penalty
provisions.content: Where a person fails to pay any prescribed fee three months after the due date, the person shall be required to pay such a fee and a penalty of fifty per centum of the total sum of the prescribed fee.

provisions.title: Suspension and cancellation
provisions.content: The Council may supspend or cancel any person who contravenes the provisions of sub-regulation (1) of regulations (3) . Part III – Forms

provisions.title: Forms
provisions.content: (1) Any person who intends to be registered, enrolled, enlisted or licensed under the Act shall fill in an appropriate form in form MRIP-4 set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations. (2) The applicant shall, upon filling in the form, return the form to the Registrar within the period set therein. (3) Where an inquiry has been directed to be held, the Registrar shall be required to serve the:— (a) alleged Medical Radiology and Imaging Professional or Licensed Person with a form of Notice of an inquiry in form MRIPA - 1 set out in the Second schedule to these Regulations; (b) witnesses with a form of summons to give evidence in form MRIP-2 set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations; and (c) the concerned parties with a form of summons to produce documents as set out in form MRIP-3 of Second Schedule of these Regulations. (4) No form shall be issued unless such form bears the Seal of the Council. (5) Subject to sub regulations (1) , the Registrar shall enter the particulars of all approved applications in an appropriate Register, Roll or List set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations. (6) Subject to sub regulation (1) , each registered, enrolled, enlisted or licensed Medical Radiology and Imaging Professional shall be required to retain his name in the Register, Roll or List by paying retention fee and filling a form MRIPA 5 as set out in the Second Schedule to these Regulations. (7) The Council shall, through the respective supervisors, be required to issue an identity for practice in respect of Medical Radiology and Imaging Professionals within forty five days upon receipt of their retention fees.
